---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about setting up or using Spareflow AI.
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question, documentation
assignees: ''
---

**What is your question?**
Please state your question clearly.

**What have you tried or researched?**
Include any files or documentation pages you've already read (e.g. `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` or `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md`).

**Screenshots / Code Snippets**
If applicable, include screenshots or code blocks to make your question easier to answer.
